extDescription.message: Aim-guide overlay for Miniclip 8 Ball Pool. Draw guidelines to sink balls with ease.

popupToggleLabel.description: Label for the main on/off toggle in the popup

popupModeLabel.description: Label for the guide mode selector

popupModePockets.description: Mode: show lines from all 6 pockets to mouse cursor

popupModeCue.description: Mode: show a single aim line from cue ball toward mouse

popupModeBoth.description: Mode: show both pocket lines and cue stick line

statusGameDetected.description: Status shown when the user is on the Miniclip game page

statusNotGamePage.description: Status shown when the user is not on the game page

shortcutHint.message: Press Shift to toggle the overlay while playing
